modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to install local USB printer; print jobs not processing.

full_description_text: 
I am having trouble installing my local USB printer. The print jobs are not going to the printer at all. I need help with this issue as I cannot print anything. Please assist me with the installation process.
short_description: Unable to install local USB printer; print jobs not processing.
description: I am having trouble installing my local USB printer. The print jobs are not going to the printer at all. I need help with this issue as I cannot print anything. Please assist me with the installation process.
